specs.title: cp-000: Route-level error UI passes error and reset into ErrorDisplay
cp-001: Projects returned ordered by updated_at DESC most recent first
cp-002: New actions that modify a project update updated_at moving it to the top
cp-003: createProject revalidates projects and dashboard
cp-004: updateProject updateProjectStatus archiveProject and deleteProject all revalidat
cp-005: Default viewMode is list on first render
cp-006: Initial in-component fetch shows a centered SpinnerGap loading indicator while g
cp-007: Clicking an entire list row navigates to studioproject_id via DataTable row clic
cp-008: updated_at falls back to an em dash when a project has no last-edited timestamp
cp-009: Closing the New Project modal resets all create-form fields back to their defaul
cp-010: Successful project creation redirects to editornewprojectnewProjectId
cp-011: Archived projects hide the Archive action button in both list rows and grid card
cp-012: Grid footer pluralizes resource counts 1 paper vs 2 papers 1 doc vs 2 docs
cp-013: Inline status and action controls call stopPropagation so they do not trigger ro
cp-014: Failed delete requests trigger fetchProjects to restore the server state after o
cp-015: Failed archive requests trigger fetchProjects to restore the server state after
cp-016: Failed status updates trigger fetchProjects to restore the server state after op
cp-017: Closing the Status Update modal clears the stored statusTarget project context
cp-018: Mutation failures only log to the console the page shows no toast inline alert o
cp-019: loading defaults to true before the first getProjects call resolves
cp-020: activeTab defaults to all
cp-021: search defaults to an empty string
cp-022: statusFilter defaults to all
cp-023: viewMode defaults to list
cp-024: showNewModal defaults to false
cp-025: showStatusModal defaults to false
cp-026: Initial page fetch calls getProjects through fetchProjects
cp-027: Initial fetch failure logs Failed to load projects to the console
cp-028: While loading is true the page shows only a centered SpinnerGap icon
cp-029: Header count badge displays projectslength not filteredlength
cp-030: ListGrid toggle is rendered as a two-button segmented control
cp-031: List toggle is the selected button on first render
cp-032: Selected view button uses bg-surface-raised text-ink
cp-033: Unselected view button uses text-ink-muted with hover text-color change
cp-034: Clicking New Project sets showNewModal to true
